title.en: PMDA Issues Precautions for Handling of Sustained-Release Preparations
title.zh: PMDA发布缓释制剂处理注意事项

summary.en: The Japanese Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency (PMDA) issued a safety notice outlining precautions for handling sustained-release preparations. This informational alert advises healthcare professionals on proper handling procedures to mitigate potential risks associated with these products. Users should review the guidance and implement the recommended practices to ensure safe handling and administration.
summary.zh: 日本药品和医疗器械管理局（PMDA）发布了一项安全通知，概述了缓释制剂处理的注意事项。该信息性警报建议医疗专业人员遵循正确的处理程序，以降低相关产品潜在风险。使用者应查阅该指南并执行所建议的实施方法，确保安全处理与给药。

title.en: PMDA Notice: Precautions for Cleaning and Disinfection of Gastrointestinal Endoscopes
title.zh: PMDA发布胃肠内镜清洗消毒注意事项

summary.en: Japan's PMDA has issued a safety notice emphasizing proper cleaning and disinfection procedures for gastrointestinal endoscopes. This informational alert targets healthcare facilities and reprocessing staff, highlighting risks of patient infection from inadequate reprocessing. Facilities are urged to strictly follow validated reprocessing protocols, ensure immediate pre-cleaning, and maintain proper chemical disinfectant concentrations and contact times.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布安全通知，强调胃肠内镜的正确清洗与消毒程序。该信息性警示面向医疗机构及处理人员，指出再处理不当可能导致患者感染。各机构须严格遵守已验证的再处理方案，确保及时预清洗，并保证化学消毒剂浓度与作用时间达标。

title.en: PMDA Safety Alert: Bleeding Risk with Impella Circulatory Assistance Pump Catheter
title.zh: 日本PMDA警示：Impella循环辅助泵导管存在出血风险

summary.en: The PMDA issued a safety notice warning of bleeding complications associated with the Impella circulatory assistance pump catheter (Abiomed). Healthcare professionals must manage anticoagulation carefully and monitor patients closely for signs of bleeding. Prompt adverse event reporting is requested to mitigate patient harm.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布安全通告，警示使用Impella循环辅助泵导管（制造商Abiomed）可能导致出血并发症。要求医护人员严格管理抗凝治疗，密切监测出血体征，并及时报告不良事件以降低患者风险。

title.en: PMDA Safety Alert: Incorrect Dosing with Insulin-Specific Syringes May Cause Serious Adverse Effects
title.zh: PMDA安全警示：胰岛素专用注射器剂量错误可能导致严重不良健康影响

summary.en: Japan's PMDA issued a safety alert warning that improper use of insulin-specific syringes can cause incorrect dosing and serious adverse health events. Healthcare professionals are advised to verify syringe type and markings, ensure proper patient training, and report any related incidents immediately. The alert stresses that accurate dose measurement is critical to patient safety.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布安全警示，指出胰岛素专用注射器的不当使用可能导致剂量错误及严重不良健康事件。警示要求医疗专业人员确认注射器类型和刻度，确保患者接受正确培训，并立即上报相关事件。该文件强调准确计量剂量对患者安全至关重要。

title.en: [Class II] ゼオステント　ＨＧ (経消化管胆道ドレナージステント) - ゼオンメディカル株式会社
title.zh: [Class II] ゼオステント　ＨＧ (経消化管胆道ドレナージステント) - ゼオンメディカル株式会社

summary.en: Recall #2-12870: 経消化管胆道ドレナージステント / ゼオステント　ＨＧ by ゼオンメディカル株式会社. Type: 医療機器.
summary.zh: Recall #2-12870: 経消化管胆道ドレナージステント / ゼオステント　ＨＧ by ゼオンメディカル株式会社. Type: 医療機器.

title.en: PMDA Issues Safety Precautions for Handling of Gastrostomy Catheters
title.zh: PMDA发布胃造口导管操作安全注意事项

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has issued a safety notice reminding healthcare professionals of critical precautions when handling gastrostomy catheters. Incorrect replacement or fixation can lead to serious complications, including peritonitis, bleeding, or death. Users must follow manufacturer instructions meticulously and confirm proper placement before use.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布安全通告，提醒医疗人员注意胃造口导管的操作风险。导管更换或固定不当可能导致腹膜炎、出血甚至死亡等严重并发症，操作时必须严格遵循厂商说明书并确认位置正确。

title.en: PMDA Safety Alert: Air Embolism Cases Associated with Central Venous Catheter Use
title.zh: PMDA安全警示：中心静脉导管使用引起空气栓塞病例

summary.en: Japan's PMDA issued a safety alert on air embolism cases linked to the use of central venous catheters. Healthcare providers are urged to follow strict handling procedures to prevent air entry, including proper priming, secure connections, and avoiding open stopcocks. The alert highlights the potentially fatal risk and recommends immediate intervention if air embolism is suspected. No specific recall class is assigned, but the notice is a high-importance safety communication.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了关于中心静脉导管使用引发空气栓塞病例的安全警示。监管机构敦促医务人员严格遵守防空气进入的操作规程，包括正确预充、确保连接稳固、避免开放旋塞阀等。该警示强调了可能致命的危险，建议怀疑空气栓塞时立即干预。虽未设定召回等级，但属于高重要性安全通报。

title.en: PMDA Safety Notice: Precautions for Handling Guidewires
title.zh: PMDA安全通告：导丝操作注意事项

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has published a safety notice titled 'Precautions for Handling Guidewires', reminding healthcare professionals of proper techniques to avoid device breakage, tip separation, or vascular injury. The document outlines key precautions for manipulation, inspection, and use of guidewires. Users are advised to review the full guidance and ensure all staff are trained accordingly.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了《导丝操作注意事项》安全通告，提醒医护人员注意正确操作，以防止导丝断裂、头端脱离或血管损伤。文件说明了操作、检查和使用导丝的关键注意事项。建议用户阅读完整指南并确保相关人员接受培训。

title.en: PMDA Safety Notice: Drug Mix-ups Due to Name Similarities (No. 2) – Nonproprietary and Brand Name Confusion
title.zh: PMDA安全通告：药品名称相似导致混淆（第2号）– 通用名与商品名相似性

summary.en: This PMDA safety communication highlights risks of medication errors from look-alike or sound-alike drug names, focusing on similarity between nonproprietary (generic) and brand names. It is the second notice in a series urging healthcare professionals to verify drug identities carefully and adopt safeguards like tall man lettering. No recall class applies; it is an informational advisory for risk awareness.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布本安全通告，指出因药品通用名（非专利名）与商品名相似而引发的给药错误风险。这是系列通告的第二份，呼吁医疗专业人员仔细核对药品身份并采用大写字母区分等防范措施。本通告为信息性警示，不涉及产品召回。

title.en: PMDA Safety Notice: Precautions for Blood Purification Devices in Patients on ACE Inhibitors
title.zh: PMDA关于使用ACE抑制剂患者进行血液净化治疗的注意事项

summary.en: The PMDA issued a safety communication regarding the risk of severe anaphylactoid reactions when blood purification devices (e.g., dialyzers, hemoperfusion columns) are used in patients taking angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) inhibitors. The notice highlights the known interaction with negatively charged membranes such as AN69 and advises healthcare professionals to review device labeling, consider alternative therapies, and ensure close patient monitoring to mitigate risks.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布安全通知，针对正在服用血管紧张素转化酶（ACE）抑制剂的患者使用血液净化器械（如透析器、血液灌流柱）时可能发生严重过敏样反应的风险。该通知强调了与带负电荷膜材（如AN69膜）的已知相互作用，建议医务人员查阅器械说明书、考虑替代治疗并加强患者监护以降低风险。

title.en: PMDA Issues Precautions on Route of Administration for Total Parenteral Nutrition
title.zh: PMDA发布全肠外营养给药途径注意事项

summary.en: The PMDA has issued a safety notice regarding the route of administration for total parenteral nutrition (TPN), highlighting risks of misadministration via incorrect intravenous routes. Healthcare facilities are advised to review protocols to ensure TPN is administered only through appropriate central or peripheral lines as indicated, and to educate staff to prevent serious complications such as thrombophlebitis or extravasation.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布关于全肠外营养（TPN）给药途径的安全通知，警示错误静脉通路可能导致的风险。医疗机构应审查操作流程，确保TPN仅通过指定的中心或外周静脉通路输注，并培训医务人员，以防止血栓性静脉炎或外渗等严重并发症。

title.en: PMDA Safety Alert: Precautions in Handling of Tracheostomy Tubes (No. 2) – Risk of Inner Cannula Dislodgement
title.zh: 日本PMDA发布气管切开插管操作注意事项（第2号）安全警报：内套管脱落风险

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA issued a second safety alert (No. 2) on tracheostomy tubes, warning that the inner cannula can inadvertently dislodge from the outer cannula during suctioning, coughing, or patient movement, potentially causing airway obstruction and oxygen desaturation. Healthcare professionals are advised to always check the secure engagement of the inner and outer cannulas before and after procedures, consider using tubes without detachable inner cannulas for high-risk patients, and ensure proper fixation. Manufacturers are requested to review and enhance their instructions for use and labeling to prevent such incidents.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布第二份气管切开插管安全警报，指出在使用过程中（如吸痰、咳嗽或患者移动时）内套管可能意外脱出外套管，导致气道阻塞和低氧血症。建议医护人员在操作前后务必确认内外套管连接牢固，对高风险患者考虑使用无分离式内套管的插管，并确保妥善固定。PMDA同时要求相关制造商审查并改进使用说明书和标签，以防止此类事件发生。

title.en: PMDA Issues Precaution Revision for Perfluoron (Perfluoro-n-octane) Vitreoretinal Device
title.zh: PMDA 发布 Perfluoron（全氟辛烷）玻璃体视网膜器械注意事项修订

summary.en: The PMDA has released a revision to the precautions for Perfluoron, a perfluorocarbon liquid used in vitreoretinal surgery. The update follows post-market reports of adverse events including intraocular inflammation and retinal toxicity. Healthcare professionals must review the new warnings, contraindications, and usage guidelines to ensure patient safety.
summary.zh: 日本 PMDA 发布了对 Perfluoron（全氟辛烷玻璃体视网膜手术用液体）的注意事项修订。此次更新基于上市后不良事件报告，包括眼内炎症和视网膜毒性。医护人员需学习新的警告、禁忌症和使用指南，以保证患者安全。

title.en: PMDA Revises Precautions for Sulfite-Containing Drugs, Medical Devices, and Regenerative Products
title.zh: PMDA修订含亚硫酸盐处方药、医疗器械及再生医疗产品的注意事项

summary.en: Japan’s PMDA has issued a revision to precautions for sulfite-containing medical products, including medical devices. Manufacturers must now include warnings about the risk of allergic reactions in sulfite-sensitive patients on labeling and instructions for use. Affected devices include any that use sulfites as preservatives or excipients. Prompt label updates are required to meet the new precautionary standards.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了含亚硫酸盐医疗产品（包括医疗器械）的注意事项修订。制造商现须在标签和说明书中添加亚硫酸盐敏感患者可能发生过敏反应的警告。所有使用亚硫酸盐作为防腐剂或辅料的医疗器械均受影响。需尽快更新标签以符合新的预防性要求。

title.en: PMDA Revises Precautions for Power Morcellators, Adding Contraindication for Suspected Uterine Malignancy
title.zh: PMDA修订电动粉碎器注意事项，新增疑似子宫恶性肿瘤禁忌症

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has issued a revision to the package insert and precautions for power morcellators, explicitly contraindicated for use in patients with known or suspected uterine malignancy due to the risk of disseminating occult cancer. Manufacturers must update device labeling, incorporate risk mitigation measures such as containment systems, and ensure that healthcare professionals are informed of the new safety warnings. Immediate action is required to comply with this high-importance safety regulatory update.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布电动粉碎器说明书和注意事项修订，明确禁止在已知或疑似子宫恶性肿瘤患者中使用，因存在播散隐匿性癌的风险。制造商须更新设备标签，纳入密封袋等风险缓解措施，并确保医疗专业人员知悉新的安全警告。此高重要性安全监管更新需立即执行。

title.en: PMDA Notification on Artificial Ventilators and Other Devices Expected for Home Use
title.zh: PMDA关于预期在家庭使用的人工呼吸机等设备的通知

summary.en: The PMDA has released a regulatory notification addressing artificial ventilators and similar devices intended for home healthcare settings. This update clarifies requirements for manufacturers to ensure safe home use, potentially covering labeling, instruction manuals, and post-market surveillance. Affected manufacturers of home-use ventilators and related respiratory devices should review the notification and align their quality management and documentation accordingly to maintain compliance.
summary.zh: PMDA发布了一份关于人工呼吸机等预期在家庭使用的医疗器械的监管通知。此项更新明确了制造商为确保家庭使用安全需满足的要求，可能涉及标识、说明书和上市后监管。相关家用呼吸机和呼吸设备制造商应审查该通知，并调整其质量管理体系和文件以保持合规。

title.en: PMDA Revises Precautions for Drug-Eluting Coronary Stents and Drug-Coated Balloon Dilatation Catheters
title.zh: PMDA修订药物洗脱冠状动脉支架及药物涂层球囊扩张导管使用注意事项

summary.en: The PMDA has issued a notification revising the precautions for drug-eluting coronary stents and drug-coated balloon dilatation catheters used in percutaneous coronary angioplasty. The update addresses new safety concerns, including the risk of late stent thrombosis and coating detachment, and mandates stronger warnings in package inserts. Manufacturers of these devices must update their labeling and instructions for use accordingly, and report any related adverse events under the revised reporting timelines. The revision takes effect immediately, and all affected products in the Japanese market must comply without delay.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布通知，修订经皮冠状动脉成形术用药物洗脱支架及药物涂层球囊扩张导管的注意事项。此次更新针对晚期支架血栓形成和涂层脱落等新的安全风险，要求在说明书中加入更强的警告。相关器械制造商必须相应更新标签及使用说明书，并按修订后的时限报告任何相关不良事件。该修订立即生效，所有在日本市场销售的受影响产品须立即遵照执行。

title.en: PMDA Issues Precaution Revision for Gel-Filled Breast Implants
title.zh: 日本PMDA发布凝胶填充乳房植入物注意事项修订

summary.en: The PMDA has issued a revision to the precautionary statements for gel-filled breast implants, likely reflecting new safety findings or reinforced warnings. All manufacturers and importers of these devices in Japan must update product labeling, instructions for use, and promptly communicate the changes to healthcare facilities. Failure to implement the revision by the specified deadline may affect marketing authorization compliance.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了凝胶填充乳房植入物注意事项的修订版，可能反映新的安全性发现或加强警告。所有在日本的此类器械制造商和进口商必须更新产品标签和说明书，并及时将变更通知医疗机构。未在规定期限内落实修订内容可能会影响上市许可的合规性。

title.en: PMDA Notification on Ultrasonic Surgical Aspirator Devices: Updated Regulatory Requirements
title.zh: PMDA发布超声手术吸引器设备监管更新通知

summary.en: The PMDA has issued a notification regarding ultrasonic surgical aspirator devices, likely updating safety and performance standards or providing new guidance for manufacturers. Affected devices include ultrasonic surgical aspirators used in neurosurgery, general surgery, and other procedures. Manufacturers and importers must review the document to incorporate any revised specifications, labeling, or clinical evidence requirements, and ensure continued regulatory compliance.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了关于超声手术吸引器设备的通知，可能更新了安全与性能标准，或为制造商提供了新指南。受影响的设备包括用于神经外科、普通外科等手术的超声吸引器。制造商和进口商需审查该文件，采纳任何修订的规格、标签或临床证据要求，确保持续符合法规。

title.en: PMDA Revises Precautions for Medical Devices Containing Chlorhexidine Gluconate or Chlorhexidine Hydrochloride
title.zh: PMDA修订含葡萄糖酸氯己定或盐酸氯己定医疗器械的注意事项

summary.en: The PMDA notification addresses medical devices containing chlorhexidine gluconate or hydrochloride, adding or strengthening warnings about severe hypersensitivity (including anaphylaxis). Affected products include catheters, wound dressings, skin disinfectants, and other topical devices. Manufacturers must update package inserts and labels accordingly by the specified deadline, and implement appropriate risk mitigation measures.
summary.zh: PMDA发布通知，针对含葡萄糖酸氯己定或盐酸氯己定的医疗器械增加或加强严重过敏反应（含过敏性休克）的警告。受影响产品包括导管、伤口敷料、皮肤消毒剂等局部使用器械。制造商须按期修订说明书和标签，并采取相应风险控制措施。

title.en: PMDA Issues Revised Precaution for Power Morcellators to Mitigate Risk of Occult Uterine Sarcoma Dissemination
title.zh: PMDA发布电动旋切器修订警示以降低隐匿性子宫肉瘤播散风险

summary.en: The PMDA has revised its precaution for power morcellators used in laparoscopic hysterectomy and myomectomy, highlighting the risk of disseminating occult uterine sarcoma. Manufacturers must update product labeling and instructions for use to reflect this risk, provide training materials for healthcare professionals, and ensure appropriate patient selection criteria are communicated. The revision follows international safety alerts and aims to enhance clinical safety.
summary.zh: PMDA针对腹腔镜子宫切除术和肌瘤切除术中使用的电动旋切器发布修订警示，强调隐匿性子宫肉瘤播散的风险。制造企业须更新产品标签和说明书以反映此风险，为医疗专业人员提供培训材料，并传达适当的患者遴选标准。该修订跟随国际安全警告，旨在提升临床安全性。

title.en: Metal-on-metal artificial hip prosthesis
title.zh: Metal-on-metal artificial hip prosthesis

summary.en: Metal-on-metal artificial hip prosthesis
summary.zh: Metal-on-metal artificial hip prosthesis

title.en: Class II Recall: Intersurgical Guedel Airway (Short-Term Oropharyngeal Airway) by MC Medical Inc.
title.zh: MC Medical公司Intersurgical Guedel 口腔咽头导气管（短期使用）II类召回

summary.en: Japan's PMDA announced a Class II recall (#2-12868) for the Intersurgical Guedel Airway, a short-term oropharyngeal airway device, manufactured by MC Medical Inc. The recall addresses a device safety issue; details are available in the official PMDA notice. Healthcare facilities should immediately quarantine affected lots, discontinue use, and follow the manufacturer's return or disposal instructions.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布II类召回（编号2-12868），涉及MC Medical株式会社生产的Intersurgical Guedel口腔咽头导气管（短期使用）。此次召回针对该器械的安全性问题，详情见PMDA正式公告。医疗机构应立即隔离受影响批次，停止使用，并按制造商指示进行退货或处理。

title.en: Class II Recall of Cellex ECP System (Extracorporeal Photopheresis Device) by Vorpal Technologies
title.zh: Vorpal Technologies 的 Cellex ECP 系统（体外光分离置换设备）II 级召回

summary.en: Japan's PMDA has issued a Class II recall (Recall #2-12867) for the Cellex ECP System, an extracorporeal photopheresis device manufactured by Vorpal Technologies Co., Ltd. The recall addresses a safety concern that may affect device performance or patient safety. Healthcare facilities should identify affected devices, contact the manufacturer for corrective actions, and ensure proper follow-up per PMDA instructions.
summary.zh: 日本 PMDA 已对 Vorpal Technologies 公司生产的 Cellex ECP 系统（体外光分离置换设备）发布 II 级召回（编号 2-12867）。该召回涉及可能影响设备性能或患者安全的问题。医疗机构应识别受影响设备，联系制造商采取纠正措施，并根据 PMDA 要求进行后续跟进。

title.en: Class II Recall of SENECA PLIF Titanium Cage (Spinal Cage) by Mahé Medical Japan
title.zh: 日本PMDA II级召回：SENECA PLIF钛合金椎间融合器（马赫医疗日本）

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA issued a Class II recall (No. 2-12865) for the SENECA PLIF titanium cage, a spinal interbody fusion device from Mahé Medical Japan Co., Ltd. The recall signifies a moderate risk, though specific safety defects were not detailed in the initial notice. Affected healthcare facilities should immediately quarantine the device and follow the manufacturer’s recall instructions to ensure patient safety.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布了一项II级召回（编号2-12865），涉及马赫医疗日本公司生产的SENECA PLIF钛合金椎间融合器（脊椎融合器）。该召回表明存在中等程度的风险，但最先发布的公告未详述具体缺陷。相关医疗机构应立即隔离该产品，并遵守制造商的召回通知，以确保患者安全。

title.en: Class II Recall: ChemoSafe Lock (Bag Spike) Closed System Drug Transfer Device by Terumo (Recall #2-12861)
title.zh: 二级召回：泰尔茂ChemoSafe Lock（袋用穿刺器）密闭式药物转移系统（召回编号2-12861）

summary.en: Terumo Corporation has initiated a Class II recall for its ChemoSafe Lock (Bag Spike), a closed system drug transfer device, under PMDA recall number 2-12861. This recall is due to a potential safety issue that poses a moderate risk. Healthcare providers should immediately stop using the affected lots and follow the manufacturer’s return or disposal instructions.
summary.zh: 泰尔茂株式会社已对其ChemoSafe Lock（袋用穿刺器）密闭式药物转移系统发起二级召回，PMDA召回编号2-12861。此次召回归因于一项中等风险的安全问题。医疗机构应立即停用受影响批次，并按照厂家指示进行退货或处置。

title.en: PMDA Class II Recall of Well Walk Active Extension/Flexion/Rotation Exercise Device by Good Life Design (No. 2-12858)
title.zh: PMDA II类召回：Good Life Design的Well Walk主动式伸展/屈曲/旋转运动装置（召回号2-12858）

summary.en: The PMDA has issued a Class II recall for the Well Walk (model: active extension, flexion, and rotation exercise device) manufactured by Good Life Design Co., Ltd. This recall (No. 2-12858) addresses a potential safety concern that may affect device performance or patient safety. Healthcare facilities and users should identify affected units, cease use as directed, and follow the manufacturer's instructions for inspection, repair, or return.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA已对株式会社Good Life Design生产的Well Walk（主动式伸展、屈曲、旋转运动装置）发出II类召回通知（召回编号2-12858）。该召回针对可能影响设备性能或患者安全的潜在问题。相关医疗机构和用户应立即停止使用受影响批次，并根据制造商的指示进行检查、维修或退换。

title.en: Olympus UHI-4 High-Speed Insufflator Class II Recall (#2-12856) Issued by PMDA
title.zh: 奥林巴斯 UHI-4 高速气腹机 II 级召回（#2-12856）

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has issued a Class II recall (#2-12856) for the Olympus Medical Systems UHI-4 High-Speed Insufflator used in laparoscopic procedures. A Class II recall indicates a situation where the product may cause temporary or medically reversible adverse health consequences, or the probability of serious harm is remote. The specific safety issue was not detailed in the alert, but affected devices should be removed from use and handled per the manufacturer's instructions. Healthcare facilities should verify inventory and contact Olympus for corrective actions.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA对奥林巴斯医疗系统公司生产的腹腔镜用UHI-4高速气腹机发布了II级召回（编号#2-12856）。II级召回表示该产品可能导致暂时的或医学上可逆的不良健康后果，或严重危害的可能性极小。召回通知未详述具体安全原因，但受影响设备应停止使用并按制造商指示处理。医疗机构须核查库存并联系奥林巴斯采取纠正措施。

title.en: Japan PMDA Class II Recall: Arcatena Disposable Angiography Kit by Nemoto Kyorindo
title.zh: 日本PMDA II级召回：根本杏林堂Arcatena一次性血管造影套件

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has announced a Class II recall (#2-12854) for the Arcatena Disposable Kit, an angiography kit manufactured by Nemoto Kyorindo Co., Ltd. The recall is due to a potential quality issue that could affect device safety or performance during angiography procedures. Healthcare providers should immediately quarantine affected product lots, halt use, and follow the manufacturer's return or disposal instructions.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA发布II级召回（编号2-12854），涉及根本杏林堂株式会社生产的Arcatena一次性血管造影套件。召回原因为可能影响产品安全或性能的质量问题。相关医疗机构应立即隔离受影响批次、暂停使用，并按制造商指引进行退货或处置。

title.en: Class II Recall: B. Braun's Intrafix SafeSet Needle-Free Gravity Infusion Set (Recall #2-12852)
title.zh: II级召回：贝朗Intrafix SafeSet无针重力输液器（召回编号2-12852）

summary.en: Japan's PMDA has issued a Class II recall (No. 2-12852) for B. Braun Ace Scissors Co., Ltd.'s Intrafix SafeSet, a needle-free gravity drip infusion set. The recall addresses a safety issue identified with this medical device. Healthcare facilities should immediately identify and quarantine affected lots, discontinue use, and follow the manufacturer's return or disposal instructions to prevent potential patient harm.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA已发布贝朗Ace Scissors公司Intrafix SafeSet无针重力输液器的II级召回（编号2-12852），涉及该医疗器械的安全性问题。医疗机构应立即识别并隔离受影响批次，停止使用，并按照制造商的退货或处置指示执行，以避免潜在的患者风险。

title.en: Class I Recall: Terumo RelayPro Thoracic Stent Graft System (Recall #1-2475)
title.zh: I级召回：泰尔茂RelayPro胸主动脉覆膜支架系统（召回号1-2475）

summary.en: The Japanese PMDA has issued a Class I recall (most serious) for Terumo Corporation's RelayPro Thoracic Stent Graft System, an aortic stent graft. This recall (#1-2475) requires immediate action. Healthcare facilities should stop using the device, quarantine affected units, and follow the manufacturer's recall instructions to prevent patient harm.
summary.zh: 日本PMDA已对泰尔茂株式会社生产的RelayPro胸主动脉覆膜支架系统（主动脉用支架）发布I级召回（最严重级别），召回号1-2475。医疗机构应立即停用该产品，隔离相关器械，并按照制造商召回通知采取行动，以防止对患者造成伤害。
